focus: Split code into small reusable components
Extract business logic into hooks or utils
Avoid deeply nested or spaghetti code
Use descriptive variable and function names

recommendations.description: Prefer functional components with clear props, each component should do one thing.
Extract API calls, transformations, and complex calculations into separate hooks or utils.
Organize by feature: each feature folder contains components, hooks, types, and styles.
Avoid long files. Split files over 200 lines. Keep functions pure when possible.
